programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning host the Canadiens for a decisive Game 7 of the Eastern Conference First Round. Both teams recorded 106 points in the regular season. Tampa Bay forced this Game 7 with an overtime victory to avoid elimination in Game 6.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Avalanche and Wild open their Western Conference second-round series. The Presidents' Trophy-winning Avalanche enter after a first-round sweep, while the Wild advanced in six. Nathan MacKinnon had seven points versus the Wild this year.

programme.title: The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.title: Live: CBC Ontario News
programme.desc: A comprehensive look at the day's top stories.

programme.title: CBC Docs POV
programme.desc: Daniel Bartholomew-Poyser is an unlikely hero on a mission to create live orchestral shows that are for everyone.

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: Earth's first animals, 500 million years old, are just being uncovered.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty and Amy's relationship is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Super Why's Comic Book Adventures
programme.desc: The plug that powers the city has come out of its socket; Power Paige and Princess Presto have to restore power to Reader Valley by finding a plug that looks like the letter P.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Island Explorers
programme.desc: When a drought on Dino Island causes the wild dinos to fight over their water supply, it's up to the Dino Ranchers to intervene.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Humsquatch ; Pups Stop a Far Flung Flying Disc
programme.desc: The heroic rescue pups, led by a tech-savvy boy named Ryder work together to protect the community; geared with special skills, gadgets and vehicles that help them on their rescue missions, the PAW Patrol is always up for the challenge.

programme.title: Live: CBC Toronto News
programme.desc: Dwight Drummond and team take a comprehensive look at the top stories, with breaking news, reports and updates relevant to the city of Toronto.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The latest hockey action from across the NHL.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Based on an award-winning memoir from Mark Critch, "Son of a Critch" is the hilarious and very real story of a young Mark coming of age in the 1980s. Developed from Critch's 2018 memoir, which was in turn based on his real life experiences growing up in Newfoundland, Canada, the series is a heartfelt window in the life of a child who is much older inside than his 11 years. He uses comedy and self-deprecation to win friends and connect with the small collection of people in his limited junior high world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.
